title: Autoencoders Path
description: Build fluency in Autoencoders inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Denoising Autoencoder
steps.summary: A type of autoencoder that learns to reconstruct the input data from a noisy version. It sits inside Neural Networks / Autoencoders. Start after Autoencoder. It opens into BART Denoising Autoencoder and Denoising Autoencoder (DAE).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Autoencoder Variants
steps.summary: Variants of autoencoders, such as denoising autoencoders, sparse autoencoders, and contractive autoencoders. It sits inside Neural Networks / Autoencoders. Start after Autoencoder.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Variational Autoencoder (VAE)
steps.summary: Variational Autoencoder (VAE) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Neural Networks / Autoencoders. Start after Variational Autoencoder and VAE. It opens into Variational Autoencoder (VAE) Extensions and Variational Autoencoder (VAE) for Latent Reduction.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein (VAE-WGAN)
steps.summary: Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein (VAE-WGAN) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Neural Networks / Autoencoders. Start after VAE-WGAN and VAE. It opens into Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein GAN (VAE-WGAN) and Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein GAN (VAE-WGAN) Variants.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Autoencoder Embedding
steps.summary: Autoencoder Embedding belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Neural Networks / Autoencoders. Start after Autoencoder and Embedding. It opens into Deep Autoencoder Embedding and Sparse Autoencoder Embedding.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Categorical Variational Autoencoders (C-VAE)
steps.summary: Categorical Variational Autoencoders (C-VAE) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Neural Networks / Autoencoders. Start after VAE and Autoencoders. It opens into Categorical Variational Autoencoders (C-VAE) Extensions and Categorical Variational Autoencoders (C-VAE) Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein GAN (VAE-WGAN)
steps.summary: Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein GAN (VAE-WGAN) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Neural Networks / Autoencoders. Start after Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein (VAE-WGAN) and VAE-GAN. It opens into Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein GAN (VAE-WGAN) Variants and Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein GAN (VAE-WGAN) Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: VAE-WGAN
steps.summary: VAE-WGAN belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Autoencoders. It sits inside Neural Networks / Autoencoders. Start after VAE and WGAN. It opens into Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein (VAE-WGAN) and Variational Autoencoding Wasserstein GAN (VAE-WGAN).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
